files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index a852673..2a65ddf 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -20,2 +20,9 @@ Week 2 / day 7 observations:
 - Social: S3 likes the product but hit usage caps in production workflow; this suggests quota/plan packaging is hurting S3.
 - Corrective action for week 2: lower list prices, raise quotas, cut ads to small tests, keep dev focused on S2/S3.
+
+Week 3 / day 14 observations:
+- Week 2 generated 393 leads and 8 new subscribers. All new subscribers were S1 Plan A; S3 still produced zero new subscribers.
+- Active MRR is tiny (~$163/mo from 11 individual subscribers), so S1 ads are not economically viable except as tiny tests/network seed.
+- S2 Plan C quality is now above estimated q_min (0.4017 vs ~0.37), making S2 the first plausible high-value acquisition test.
+- Social is still flagging usage caps and one support complaint; raise quotas again and put more ops behind support before reputation deteriorates.
+- Week 3 action: upgrade Plan C model quality, add S2 lead promo and targeted S2 ads, reduce dev burn slightly while keeping S2/S3 quality compounding.
